Issues: High risk of Intellectual Property (IP) infringement: Although the phrase 'Dream Big' is generic, the specific combination of the script font, the color palette, and any partially visible text/logos on the garment (which often constitute a unique design element) may infringe on existing trademarks or copyrighted branding. This is the biggest hurdle to selling this item.

Lack of Differentiation: 'Dream Big' is an extremely common and cliché inspirational phrase. Because it is so widely used, the product lacks a unique selling proposition (USP) and will be difficult to market or sell successfully.
Generic Design: The design is safe and positive, but it is not artistically unique enough to command a premium price point in a competitive market.

Ambiguity of Branding: The visible, obscured text running along the neckline suggests potential brand integration or motto, but without clear context, it adds confusion regarding legal compliance and authenticity.
